历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category decreased from approximately 7336 to 7021 to 5323 to 4601 to 4428, showing a continuous upward trend (smaller ranking numbers indicate increased competition), with a cumulative advancement of about 2900 places in the last three years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 4428; the provincial science/physics enrollment plan was 155 in 2021, 154 in 2022, 154 in 2023, 138 in 2024, and 146 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 150, a slight expansion of about 2.7% compared to 2025, slightly alleviating competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
211, Double First-Class; the main ranking of Soft Science has steadily risen from 50th in 2021 to 43rd in 2026, reflecting the school's increasing comprehensive strength; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no significant negative public opinion; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 27th (relatively hot), Zhang Xuefeng has repeatedly recommended the school's flagship majors such as underwater acoustics engineering and nuclear engineering, short video exposure is positive, which has a warming effect on application interest.

[Advantageous Disciplines] Control Science and Engineering A (fifth round evaluation), ship and ocean engineering, underwater acoustics engineering, nuclear engineering and nuclear technology are national characteristic specialties, highly aligned with the current hot fields of electronic information/communication, electrical engineering, computer science, etc.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering and automation are all highly recommended in 2026, highly matching Harbin Engineering University's advantageous specialties; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Jilin Province general college entrance examination is 110,868, with an estimated physics category of about 79,800 based on recent proportions, slightly lower than the 80,400 in 2025, keeping competition pressure basically flat; Harbin Engineering University is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang, in the same Northeast region as Jilin, naturally attractive to Jilin candidates; the school has a large enrollment scale in Jilin (about 150 in physics category), making it a key source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous upward trend in historical rankings, steady improvement in school ranking, high Douyin popularity, and high overlap between advantageous majors and popular majors, despite the slight expansion in the 2026 plan, application enthusiasm remains high, and competition is expected to slightly intensify; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4471, with a range of 3971–4971.

The school's Control Science and Engineering A discipline is outstanding, and broad enrollment majors such as Automation Category and Electronic Information Category are worth special attention.
